case_title: REBECCA PERRY VS. BMW OF NORTH AMERICA, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PERRY, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT BMW OF NORTH AMERICA, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED JUN-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BMW OF NORTH AMERICA, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERRY, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BMW OF NORTH AMERICA, LLC $3,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,500.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR ($2350.00) PLUS GENERAL DAMAGES FOR THE LOSS OF INCOME AND AND LOSS OF USE. ($1000.00) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
